channel.title: SeaVigil alerts
channel.description: New high-severity illegal-fishing leads: foreign or unauthorized vessels going dark or transshipping, from Global Fishing Watch events.

item.title: ais_disabling: GBR in United States Exclusive Economic Zone (Hawaii)
item.description: HSD-NET-99% (GBR), foreign vessel, no authorization on record. Authorization: no_record. Event time 2026-06-20T22:51:43.000Z.
